name: attendance-disposition-handler
description: Attendance_Disposition_Handler — scheduling sub-phase E (E5/E10/C13). The EventBridge Scheduler target for the missed-event loop: sets the non-key attendance_state + sends the three-option interviewer prompt (E5), runs the silence-escalation cadence t24h/t72h/t7d (E10), and pages the coordinator on a Zoom T-15 outage (C13). Thin glue over the pure shared/scheduling logic modules. Interviewer DISPOSITION (E6) is wired in Scheduling_Redemption_Handler (the HTTP /attended/* path), not here. EventBridge rule lifecycle is WS-E-REMIND (§E1) — flagged seam. IAM + Terraform are the integrator's glue.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
